environment.WIN_GCC_TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX: toolchain prefix e.g. mingw32- if using mingw32-gcc
environment.LINUX_GCC_TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX: toolchain prefix same as WIN_GCC_TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX but for linux builds
environment.ARM_GCC_TOOLCHAIN_PATH: path to arm toolchain bin directory e.g C:/ST/STM32CubeCLT_1.21.0/GNU-tools-for-STM32/bin/arm-none-eabi-
environment.TOOLCHAIN_SUFFIX: suffix to toolchain executables e.g. .exe .elf etc
